subject: Application received: Senior Product Manager at Acme Corp
bodyExcerpt: Hi Jane, thanks for applying to the Senior Product Manager opening at Acme Corp. Your application is in review. We'll be in touch soon. Powered by Lever.
notes: Lever-shaped acknowledgment — 'thanks for applying' must not trigger the rejection 0.80 tier. Verifies rule precision: only 'thank you for your interest' is the rejection signal, not the broader 'thanks for applying' phrasing.
